answered.answer: 1 Thessalonians is perceived to be theologically incompatible with Paul's other epistles because elsewhere Paul attributes Jesus's death to the 'rulers of this age' rather than to the Jews, and he writes that the Jews have not been abandoned by God, for 'all Israel will be saved'.
